title: Remote download progress jumps to ~80% then crawls
description: Remote (RunPod) model install bar pops to ~80% instantly then crawls; fix denominator + hold indeterminate until real totals known.
activeSessionTitle: Build gate CLEARED (v0.4.1+ shipped) but LIVE-VERIFY FAILED 2026-06-16: install bar still aggregates wrong + post-uninstall shows 36/36GB installed (false). Reassigned to MPI-97 owner (owns downloadManager.js progress code).
